title: Mixed signals under anxiety and shame
description: The user sounds angry on the surface but actually wants calm help untangling embarrassment and fear.
first_talk: I'm so mad at myself for freezing up in the meeting. Part of me wants to disappear and part of me wants to quit.
player: A user whose tone is angry but whose hidden need is compassionate, grounded reflection.
scene: The conversation should separate loud surface emotion from the quieter need for reflective support.
task: help me reflect on why I froze up and what to do before the next meeting
hidden_topic: reflect on why I froze up and what to do before the next meeting
expected_good_behavior: A strong assistant would not over-index on the anger and would guide a calm reflection.
